title: [Quadlet] unsupported key 'Label'
body:
### Issue Description

I'm trying to replace my Docker Compose based setup with Podman Quadlets. I'd like to group multi-container deployments into pods and then expose them via Traefik. I can do that with `podman pod create --label=...` and then setting the appropriate traefik labels but when using Quadlets I can't set labels on the pod, only on the containers in that pod (which doesn't seem to work for Traefik).

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create a pod unit file with the following content in the `~/.config/containers/systemd/` directory. This assumes there also is a basic network unit called `traefik.network` (omitted for brevity)
   ```
   [Unit]
   Description=Test pod

   [Pod]
   Network=traefik.network
   Label=traefik.enable=true

   [Install]
   WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
   ```
2. Run `systemctl --user daemon-reload` (not sure if necessary actually)
3. Run `/usr/lib/systemd/system-generators/podman-system-generator --user --dryrun` to test the generation of the systemd units

### Describe the results you received

I get the error
```
quadlet-generator[7279]: converting "test.pod": unsupported key 'Label' in group 'Pod' in /home/.../.config/containers/systemd/test.pod
```


### Describe the results you expected

The systemd unit is created correctly with the labels applied during pod creation

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
As documented the Label option is not implemented for pods https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html#pod-units-pod

As such I mark this as feature request
